features: 【Anti Aging Gift Set For Valentines Day】Turmeric Skin Care Set is rich in turmeric essence, making the skin moist and soft. Turmeric serum has the effects of shrinking pores, balancing the skin secretion of water and oil, rejuvenating skin and removing acne.Turmeric essential can help the skin resist oxidation, brighten skin tone and reduce the existing spots effectively

【Skincare Gift Set】Raw form of turmeric oil heals the appearance of colored spots, age spots, hyperpigmentation, melasma & acne scars. It gives dull skin, healthier glow & smooth tone! minimize spots and wrinkles for fairer and elastic skin with a radiant glow

【Easily Absorbed】Designed for skin care for teenage girls, our product has the perfect consistency, and the turmeric essence is absorbed quickly, without leaving greasy residue, rejuvenates skin, improves skin elasticity, restores even and translucent skin texture. You can apply our product and gently massage onto your face and eyes contour

【Suitable for All Skin Types】Our skincare products are fragrance-free, from synthetic as well as natural fragrances.This skin care sets & kits is ideal for all skin types that are prone to breakouts, blackheads, redness,post breakout marks& enlarged pores

【Pamper Gifts For Women】8pcs Skincare Gifts is an ideal gift for girls,Teenage girls,family, lovers and friends on festivals, Christmas Day, Valentine's Day, Mother's day! birthday gifts for women!This is a perfect choice for giving gifts and keeping your face and body clean and enjoying beautiful skin
